QF.id: Registration, Code of Conduct and General Obligations_7

question.text: What is the renewal fee for merchant banker registration, and when does renewal commence?

answer.text: Rs. 5 lakh every 5 years from the 3rd year
Rs. 9 lakh every 5 years from the 6th year
Rs. 9 lakh every 3 years from the 6th year
Rs. 20 lakh every 3 years from the 6th year

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The renewal fee for MB registration is Rs. 9 lakh payable every 3 years, starting from the 6th year of registration. This periodic renewal ensures ongoing compliance and financial viability. **The Trap:** Rs. 20 lakh is the initial registration fee, not the renewal fee. Candidates who memorize only one number may confuse the two. **Cross-Exam Context:** Renewal fee structures differ across SEBI intermediaries — comparing them is a useful study exercise across NISM Series IX, V-A, and X-A. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Mark your calendar for renewal deadlines — late payment attracts 15% per annum interest for every month of delay.
